error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the portal
error.no_contracts: No contracts found in the customer portal

error.invalid_date: Invalid date format. Use YYYY-MM-DD or leave it blank.

init.title: Aigües de Reus options
init.description: Adjust polling frequency, backfill window and (optionally) tariffs to estimate cost.

data_description.update_interval_hours: How often the portal is polled (1-24 hours).
data_description.backfill_days: How many days are fetched on first run or when a backfill is forced (7-180).
data_description.tariff_enabled: When disabled, the cost sensors stay unavailable.
data_description.billing_period_start: Start date of the current cycle. Auto-rolls forward when the cycle ends.
data_description.iva_rate: Applies to water + sewer only. The cànon is VAT-exempt.
data_description.water_tier1_limit_m3: Set to 0 to apply the tier 1 price to all consumption.
data_description.water_tier2_eur_per_m3: Leave 0 if your invoice has only one tier.
data_description.canon_tier1_limit_m3: Threshold in total m³ for the period (not per L/person/day).

force_backfill.name: Force backfill
force_backfill.description: Re-import hourly statistics for the configured period.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Optional integration entry ID. If omitted, applies to all entries.
